title: rinorea zenkeri
intro: Rinorea zenkeri, also known as the African or African blue passionflower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Violaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and other ailments. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to lower blood pressure, reduce pain, and improve overall health. Rinorea zenkeri can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including anxiety and insomnia.
